```
#pragma once

#include "gpu/gpu.h"

struct RenderResources {
    GpuDevice device;

    10|    // Sponza geometry
    GpuBufferHandle vertexBuffer = GPU_NULL_HANDLE;
    GpuBufferHandle indexBuffer = GPU_NULL_HANDLE;

    // Depth buffer
    GpuTextureHandle sceneDepth = GPU_NULL_HANDLE;
    GpuTextureHandle sceneDepthDsv = GPU_NULL_HANDLE;
    GpuTextureHandle sceneDepthSrv = GPU_NULL_HANDLE;

    // Light buffer
    20|    GpuBufferHandle lightBuffer = GPU_NULL_HANDLE;

    // Per-frame camera data (uploaded as constant buffer)
    GpuBufferHandle cameraBuffer = GPU_NULL_HANDLE;

    // Light cull output
    GpuBufferHandle lightIndexBuffer = GPU_NULL_HANDLE;

    // SSGI textures
    GpuTextureHandle ssgiOutput = GPU_NULL_HANDLE;
    30|    GpuTextureHandle ssgiOutputUav = GPU_NULL_HANDLE;
    GpuTextureHandle ssgiOutputSrv = GPU_NULL_HANDLE;
    GpuTextureHandle ssgiPrev = GPU_NULL_HANDLE;
    GpuTextureHandle ssgiPrevView = GPU_NULL_HANDLE;

    // CSM shadow textures (4 cascades)
    GpuTextureHandle cascadeDepth[4] = {};
    GpuTextureHandle cascadeDepthView[4] = {};
    GpuTextureHandle cascadeSRV[4] = {};

    40|    // Shared sampler
    GpuSamplerHandle linearSampler = GPU_NULL_HANDLE;
    GpuSamplerHandle shadowSampler = GPU_NULL_HANDLE;

    // Bindless table for texture descriptors (feature validation)
    GpuBindlessHeap textureBindlessHeap = nullptr;

    uint32_t surfaceWidth = 1280;
    uint32_t surfaceHeight = 720;
};
```

```
#include "render_resources.h"
#include <cstdio>

static constexpr uint32_t kShadowMapSize = 2048;

bool initRenderResources(RenderResources& r, uint32_t w, uint32_t h, uint32_t maxLights) {
    r.surfaceWidth = w;
    r.surfaceHeight = h;

    10|    // Linear sampler
    {
        GpuSamplerDesc sd = {};
        sd.minFilter = GPU_FILTER_LINEAR;
        sd.magFilter = GPU_FILTER_LINEAR;
        sd.mipFilter = GPU_FILTER_LINEAR;
        sd.addressModeU = GPU_SAMPLER_ADDRESS_MODE_REPEAT;
        sd.addressModeV = GPU_SAMPLER_ADDRESS_MODE_REPEAT;
        sd.addressModeW = GPU_SAMPLER_ADDRESS_MODE_CLAMP_TO_EDGE;
        sd.label = "linear_sampler";
    20|        if (gpuCreateSampler(r.device, &sd, &r.linearSampler) != GPU_SUCCESS) return false;
    }

    // Shadow comparison sampler
    {
        GpuSamplerDesc sd = {};
        sd.minFilter = GPU_FILTER_LINEAR;
        sd.magFilter = GPU_FILTER_LINEAR;
        sd.mipFilter = GPU_FILTER_NEAREST;
        sd.addressModeU = GPU_SAMPLER_ADDRESS_MODE_CLAMP_TO_EDGE;
    30|        sd.addressModeV = GPU_SAMPLER_ADDRESS_MODE_CLAMP_TO_EDGE;
        sd.addressModeW = GPU_SAMPLER_ADDRESS_MODE_CLAMP_TO_EDGE;
        sd.compareEnable = true;
        sd.compareOp = GPU_COMPARE_OP_LESS;
        sd.label = "shadow_sampler";
        if (gpuCreateSampler(r.device, &sd, &r.shadowSampler) != GPU_SUCCESS) return false;
    }

    // Scene depth
    recreateDepth(r, w, h);
    40|
    // Light buffer (SSBO)
    {
        GpuBufferDesc bd = {};
        bd.size = (uint64_t)maxLights * sizeof(PointLightData);
        bd.usage = GPU_BUFFER_USAGE_UNORDERED_ACCESS | GPU_BUFFER_USAGE_SHADER_RESOURCE | GPU_BUFFER_USAGE_COPY_DEST;
        bd.label = "light_buffer";
        if (gpuCreateBuffer(r.device, &bd, &r.lightBuffer) != GPU_SUCCESS) return false;
    }

    50|    // Camera buffer
    {
        GpuBufferDesc bd = {};
        bd.size = sizeof(CameraParams);
        bd.usage = GPU_BUFFER_USAGE_CONSTANT_BUFFER | GPU_BUFFER_USAGE_COPY_DEST;
        bd.label = "camera_buffer";
        if (gpuCreateBuffer(r.device, &bd, &r.cameraBuffer) != GPU_SUCCESS) return false;
    }

    // Light index buffer (culling output)
    60|    {
        uint32_t tileCount = ((w + 15) / 16) * ((h + 15) / 16);
        GpuBufferDesc bd = {};
        bd.size = (uint64_t)tileCount * 128 * sizeof(uint32_t); // up to 128 light indices per tile
        bd.usage = GPU_BUFFER_USAGE_UNORDERED_ACCESS | GPU_BUFFER_USAGE_SHADER_RESOURCE;
        bd.label = "light_index_buffer";
        if (gpuCreateBuffer(r.device, &bd, &r.lightIndexBuffer) != GPU_SUCCESS) return false;
    }

    // SSGI output (half-res)
    70|    {
        GpuTextureDesc td = {};
        td.type = GPU_TEXTURE_TYPE_2D;
        td.width = w / 2; td.height = h / 2; td.depth = 1;
        td.arrayLength = 1; td.mipCount = 1;
        td.format = GPU_FORMAT_RGBA16_FLOAT;
        td.usage = GPU_TEXTURE_USAGE_UNORDERED_ACCESS | GPU_TEXTURE_USAGE_SHADER_RESOURCE;
        td.label = "ssgi_output";
        if (gpuCreateTexture(r.device, &td, &r.ssgiOutput) != GPU_SUCCESS) return false;
        gpuCreateTextureView(r.device, r.ssgiOutput, GPU_TEXTURE_VIEW_TYPE_UNORDERED_ACCESS, &r.ssgiOutputUav);
    80|        gpuCreateTextureView(r.device, r.ssgiOutput, GPU_TEXTURE_VIEW_TYPE_SHADER_RESOURCE, &r.ssgiOutputSrv);
    }

    // SSGI prev frame (for temporal)
    {
        GpuTextureDesc td = {};
        td.type = GPU_TEXTURE_TYPE_2D;
        td.width = w / 2; td.height = h / 2; td.depth = 1;
        td.arrayLength = 1; td.mipCount = 1;
        td.format = GPU_FORMAT_RGBA16_FLOAT;
    90|        td.usage = GPU_TEXTURE_USAGE_UNORDERED_ACCESS | GPU_TEXTURE_USAGE_SHADER_RESOURCE;
        td.label = "ssgi_prev";
        if (gpuCreateTexture(r.device, &td, &r.ssgiPrev) != GPU_SUCCESS) return false;
        gpuCreateTextureView(r.device, r.ssgiPrev, GPU_TEXTURE_VIEW_TYPE_UNORDERED_ACCESS, &r.ssgiPrevView);
    }

    // CSM cascades
    for (int i = 0; i < 4; i++) {
        GpuTextureDesc td = {};
        td.type = GPU_TEXTURE_TYPE_2D;
   100|        td.width = kShadowMapSize; td.height = kShadowMapSize; td.depth = 1;
        td.arrayLength = 1; td.mipCount = 1;
        td.format = GPU_FORMAT_D32_FLOAT;
        td.sampleCount = 1;
```

```
// Forward rendering shader with CSM (cascaded shadow maps), 1K+ point lights, SSGI blend
// Hybrid: material uses Texture2DArray (correct for array data), bindless indices validated via push constants

struct CameraParams
{
    float3 cameraPos;
    float pad0;
    float3 right;
    float pad1;
    10|    float3 up;
    float pad2;
    float3 forward;
    float pad3;
    float2 proj;
    float2 zParams;
};

struct PointLightData
{
    20|    float3 position;
    float radius;
    float3 color;
    float pad;
};

struct ShadowCascadeData
{
    float4x4 viewMatrix;
    float4x4 projMatrix;
    30|    float splitDepth;
    float texelSize;
    float2 pad;
};

CameraParams camera;
Texture2DArray<float4> baseColorArray;
SamplerState linearSampler;
Texture2D<float> shadowMaps[4];
SamplerComparisonState shadowSampler;
    40|StructuredBuffer<PointLightData> pointLights;
uint pointLightCount;
float3 dirLightDir;
float dirLightIntensity;
float3 dirLightColor;
float3 ambientColor;
float4x4 cascadeViewProj[4];
ShadowCascadeData cascades[4];
Texture2D<float4> ssgiTexture;
SamplerState ssgiSampler;
    50|uint screenWidth;
uint screenHeight;

// Bindless indices (optional, pushed from C++ for API validation; shader uses direct bindings above for rendering)
uint baseColorBindlessIndex;

struct VSOut
{
    float4 position : SV_Position;
    float3 normal : NORMAL;
    60|    float2 uv : TEXCOORD0;
    float material : MATERIAL;
    float viewDepth : TEXCOORD1;
    float4 shadowPos[4] : TEXCOORD2;
    float3 worldPos : TEXCOORD6;
};

[shader("vertex")]
VSOut vertexMain(
    float3 position : POSITION,
    70|    float3 normal : NORMAL,
    float2 uv : TEXCOORD,
    float material : MATERIAL)
{
    float3 d = position - camera.cameraPos;
    float vx = dot(d, camera.right);
    float vy = dot(d, camera.up);
    float vz = dot(d, camera.forward);

    VSOut output;
    80|    output.position = float4(vx * camera.proj.x, vy * camera.proj.y, vz - camera.zParams.x, vz);
    output.normal = normalize(normal);
    output.uv = uv;
    output.material = material;
    output.viewDepth = vz;
    output.worldPos = position;

    // Compute shadow positions for each cascade
    for (int i = 0; i < 4; i++)
    {
    90|        float4 worldPos = float4(position, 1.0);
        float4 shadowClip = mul(cascadeViewProj[i], worldPos);
        output.shadowPos[i] = shadowClip;
    }

    return output;
}

float computeShadowCascade(float4 shadowPos, int cascadeIndex)
{
   100|    // Convert to NDC
    float3 ndc = shadowPos.xyz / shadowPos.w;
    if (ndc.x < -1.0 || ndc.x > 1.0 || ndc.y < -1.0 || ndc.y > 1.0 || ndc.z < 0.0 || ndc.z > 1.0)
        return 1.0; // outside cascade
    float2 uv = ndc.xy * 0.5 + 0.5;
    uv.y = 1.0 - uv.y; // flip Y

    float shadow = 0.0;
    float texel = cascades[cascadeIndex].texelSize;
    float bias = 0.001 + 0.001 * cascadeIndex;
   110|
    // PCF 3x3
    for (int y = -1; y <= 1; y++)
    {
        for (int x = -1; x <= 1; x++)
        {
            float2 offset = float2((float)x, (float)y) * texel;
            shadow += shadowMaps[cascadeIndex].SampleCmpLevelZero(shadowSampler, uv + offset, ndc.z - bias);
        }
    }
   120|    return shadow / 9.0;
}

[shader("fragment")]
float4 fragmentMain(VSOut input) : SV_Target
{
    float3 n = normalize(input.normal);
    float layer = clamp(round(input.material), 0.0, 4095.0);
    float3 albedo = baseColorArray.SampleLevel(linearSampler, float3(frac(input.uv), layer), 0).rgb;

   130|    // Ambient
    float3 color = albedo * ambientColor;

    // Directional light with cascaded shadow
    float3 lightDir = normalize(dirLightDir);
    float ndl = saturate(dot(n, lightDir));

    // Find which cascade to use
    float shadow = 0.0;
    for (int ci = 0; ci < 4; ci++)
   140|    {
        float3 ndc = input.shadowPos[ci].xyz / input.shadowPos[ci].w;
        if (ndc.x >= -1.0 && ndc.x <= 1.0 && ndc.y >= -1.0 && ndc.y <= 1.0 && ndc.z >= 0.0 && ndc.z <= 1.0)
        {
            shadow = computeShadowCascade(input.shadowPos[ci], ci);
            break;
        }
    }
    // If outside all cascades, fully lit
    if (shadow == 0.0) shadow = 1.0;
   150|
    color += albedo * dirLightColor * dirLightIntensity * ndl * shadow;

    // Point lights via structured buffer
    for (uint i = 0; i < pointLightCount; i++)
    {
        PointLightData l = pointLights[i];
        float3 toLight = float3(l.position.x, l.position.y, l.position.z) - input.worldPos;
        float dist = length(toLight);
        if (dist < l.radius)
   160|        {
            float3 ldir = toLight / max(dist, 0.001);
            float atten = saturate(1.0 - dist / l.radius);
            atten = atten * atten;
            float ndlPoint = saturate(dot(n, ldir));
            color += albedo * float3(l.color.x, l.color.y, l.color.z) * ndlPoint * atten;
        }
    }

    // SSGI blend
   170|    float2 ssgiUV = float2(input.position.x, input.position.y) / float2((float)screenWidth, (float)screenHeight);
    float3 indirect = ssgiTexture.SampleLevel(ssgiSampler, ssgiUV, 0).rgb;
    color += indirect * 0.5;

    // Fog
    float fog = saturate(input.viewDepth / 2600.0);
    color = lerp(color, float3(0.055, 0.065, 0.085), fog);

    return float4(color, 1.0);
}
```

```
// Demo 24: Sponza with Render Graph, Cascaded Shadow Maps, 1K+ Lights, SSGI
//
// Features:
// - Render graph based frame orchestration (no manual barriers)
// - Cascaded shadow maps (CSM) with 4 cascades at 2048x2048 each
// - 1024 animated point lights with per-frame GPU upload
// - Screen-space global illumination (SSGI) compute pass at half-res
// - Tile-based light culling via compute shader
// - Per-frame graph compile/execute with automatic resource state transitions
    10|//
// Controls: WASD move, Q/E down/up, right-mouse drag look, IJKL look, Esc quit

#define WIN32_LEAN_AND_MEAN

    20|

// ============================================================================
// Path utilities (shared with sponza_loader)
// ============================================================================

static int pathJoin(char* out, size_t outSize, const char* root, const char* leaf) {
    size_t rootLen = strlen(root), leafLen = strlen(leaf);
    bool needsSlash = rootLen > 0 && root[rootLen-1] != '/' && root[rootLen-1] != '\\';
    size_t totalLen = rootLen + (needsSlash?1:0) + leafLen;
    if (totalLen+1 > outSize) return 0;
    70|    memcpy(out, root, rootLen); size_t offset = rootLen;
    if (needsSlash) out[offset++] = '/';
    memcpy(out+offset, leaf, leafLen);
    out[totalLen] = 0; return 1;
}

static bool fileExists(const char* path) { std::ifstream f(path, std::ios::binary); return f.good(); }

static bool pathDirName(char* path) {
    size_t len = strlen(path);
    80|    while (len > 0) { char c = path[len-1]; if (c=='/'||c=='\\') { path[len-1]=0; return true; } len--; }
    return false;
}

static bool getExecutableDir(char* out, size_t outSize, const char* argv0) {
#ifdef _WIN32
    DWORD len = GetModuleFileNameA(nullptr, out, (DWORD)outSize);
    if (len > 0 && len < outSize && pathDirName(out)) return true;
#endif
    if (argv0 && argv0[0]) { size_t argvLen = strlen(argv0); if (argvLen+1 <= outSize) { memcpy(out, argv0, argvLen+1); return pathDirName(out); } }
    90|    return false;
}

static bool isSponzaRoot(const char* root) {
    char objPath[kMaxPathText], mtlPath[kMaxPathText];
    return pathJoin(objPath, sizeof(objPath), root, "sponza.obj") &&
           pathJoin(mtlPath, sizeof(mtlPath), root, "sponza.mtl") &&
           fileExists(objPath) && fileExists(mtlPath);
}

   100|static const char* resolveSponzaRoot(const char* explicitRoot, const char* argv0, char* resolved, size_t resolvedSize) {
    if (!explicitRoot) explicitRoot = getenv("SPONZA_ROOT");
    if (explicitRoot && isSponzaRoot(explicitRoot)) return explicitRoot;
    char exeDir[kMaxPathText], candidate[kMaxPathText];
    if (getExecutableDir(exeDir, sizeof(exeDir), argv0)) {
        if (pathJoin(candidate, sizeof(candidate), exeDir, "Sponza") && isSponzaRoot(candidate)) { snprintf(resolved, resolvedSize, "%s", candidate); return resolved; }
        if (pathJoin(candidate, sizeof(candidate), exeDir, "assets/Sponza") && isSponzaRoot(candidate)) { snprintf(resolved, resolvedSize, "%s", candidate); return resolved; }
    }
    const char* candidates[] = {".", "Sponza", "assets/Sponza", "../Sponza", "../assets/Sponza"};
    for (const char* p : candidates) { if (isSponzaRoot(p)) { snprintf(resolved, resolvedSize, "%s", p); return resolved; } }
   110|    return nullptr;
}

// ============================================================================
// Per-frame data shared between render graph callbacks
// ============================================================================

// Matrix utility: build a 4x4 view matrix from camera basis
static void buildViewMatrix(const CameraParams& cam, float* out) {
    memset(out, 0, sizeof(float) * 16);
   120|    // Rotation: right, up, -forward as rows
    out[0] = cam.right[0]; out[1] = cam.right[1]; out[2] = cam.right[2];
    out[4] = cam.up[0];    out[5] = cam.up[1];    out[6] = cam.up[2];
    out[8] = -cam.forward[0]; out[9] = -cam.forward[1]; out[10] = -cam.forward[2];

// Build a 4x4 projection matrix from CameraParams (custom reversed-z style)
static void buildProjMatrix(const CameraParams& cam, float* out) {
    memset(out, 0, sizeof(float) * 16);
    float fx = cam.proj[0], fy = cam.proj[1];
    float n = cam.zParams[0], f = cam.zParams[1];
    out[0] = fx;  out[5] = fy;  out[10] = f / (f - n);  out[11] = 1.0f;
    out[14] = (-f * n) / (f - n);
    // W = vz; Z = vz * f/(f-n) - f*n/(f-n); homogenous division gives: Z_clip = (f/(f-n)) - (f*n/(f-n))/vz
   140|}

// Render graph pass callbacks (forward declared above)

   520|static void setCommonRenderState(GpuGraphPassContext* ctx, FrameData* d) {
    if (!ctx->renderPass) return;

    st.viewportCount = 1;
    st.scissorRects[0] = ScissorRect::fromSize(d->surfaceWidth, d->surfaceHeight);
    st.scissorRectCount = 1;
    st.vertexBuffers[0] = d->rhiVertexBuffer;
    st.vertexBufferCount = 1;
    st.indexBuffer = d->rhiIndexBuffer;
   530|    st.indexFormat = IndexFormat::Uint32;
    ctx->renderPass->rhiPassEncoder->setRenderState(st);
}

static void shadowPassCallback(GpuGraphPassContext* ctx, void* userData) {
    FrameData* d = (FrameData*)userData;
    if (!ctx->renderPass || !d->pipelines->shadowPipeline || !d->pipelines->shadowRootObj) return;

    rhi::IRenderPassEncoder* rpEnc = ctx->renderPass->rhiPassEncoder;

   540|    // Set cascade cameras into shadow root shader object

        // CascadeUniforms has: ShadowCameraParams cascades[4];
        for (int ci = 0; ci < 4; ci++) {
            c["cascadeData"]["cascades"][ci].setData(d->shadowCameras[ci]);
        }
    }

   550|    rpEnc->bindPipeline(d->pipelines->shadowPipeline, d->pipelines->shadowRootObj);

    RenderState st = {};
    st.viewports[0] = Viewport::fromSize((float)kShadowMapSize, (float)kShadowMapSize);
    st.viewportCount = 1;
    st.scissorRects[0] = ScissorRect::fromSize(kShadowMapSize, kShadowMapSize);
    st.scissorRectCount = 1;
    st.vertexBuffers[0] = d->rhiVertexBuffer;
    st.vertexBufferCount = 1;
    st.indexBuffer = d->rhiIndexBuffer;
   560|    st.indexFormat = IndexFormat::Uint32;
    rpEnc->setRenderState(st);

        DrawArguments a = {};
        a.vertexCount = draw.indexCount;
        a.instanceCount = 4; // 4 cascades via instancing
        a.startIndexLocation = draw.firstIndex;
        rpEnc->drawIndexed(a);
    }
   570|}

static void forwardPassCallback(GpuGraphPassContext* ctx, void* userData) {
    FrameData* d = (FrameData*)userData;

        c["dirLightColor"].setData(d->dirLightColor);
        c["dirLightIntensity"].setData(d->dirLightIntensity);
        c["ambientColor"].setData(d->ambientColor);
        c["screenWidth"].setData(d->surfaceWidth);
        c["screenHeight"].setData(d->surfaceHeight);

   590|        // Bind base color texture array + linear sampler (CRITICAL: without these albedo=black)

   610|                d->resources->cascadeSRV[ci].generation);

static void ssgiPassCallback(GpuGraphPassContext* ctx, void* userData) {
    FrameData* d = (FrameData*)userData;
    if (!ctx->computePass || !d->pipelines->ssgiPipeline || !d->pipelines->ssgiRootObj) return;
   660|    auto* cpEnc = reinterpret_cast<IComputePassEncoder*>(ctx->computePass);

static void lightCullPassCallback(GpuGraphPassContext* ctx, void* userData) {
    FrameData* d = (FrameData*)userData;
```

```
    20|#include <sstream>

static constexpr uint32_t kMaxPathText = 1024;

static int pathJoin(char* out, size_t outSize, const char* root, const char* leaf) {
    size_t rootLen = strlen(root), leafLen = strlen(leaf);
    bool needsSlash = rootLen > 0 && root[rootLen - 1] != '/' && root[rootLen - 1] != '\\';
    size_t totalLen = rootLen + (needsSlash ? 1 : 0) + leafLen;
    if (totalLen + 1 > outSize) return 0;
    memcpy(out, root, rootLen); size_t offset = rootLen;
    30|    if (needsSlash) out[offset++] = '/';
    memcpy(out + offset, leaf, leafLen);
    out[totalLen] = 0; return 1;
}

static bool fileExists(const char* path) { std::ifstream f(path, std::ios::binary); return f.good(); }

static std::string textureFileToken(const std::string& value) {
    std::istringstream ss(value); std::string token, last;
    while (ss >> token) last = token; return last;
    40|}

static std::string baseName(const std::string& path) {
    size_t slash = path.find_last_of("/\\");
    return slash == std::string::npos ? path : path.substr(slash + 1);
}

static bool resolveTexturePath(const char* root, const std::string& materialPath, char* out, size_t outSize) {
    std::string token = textureFileToken(materialPath);
    std::replace(token.begin(), token.end(), '\\', '/');
    50|    if (token.empty()) return false;
    if (pathJoin(out, outSize, root, token.c_str()) && fileExists(out)) return true;
    char texturesDir[kMaxPathText];
    if (pathJoin(texturesDir, sizeof(texturesDir), root, "textures")) {
        std::string name = baseName(token);
        if (pathJoin(out, outSize, texturesDir, name.c_str()) && fileExists(out)) return true;
    }
    return false;
}

    60|static void resizeRgbaNearest(const uint8_t* src, int sw, int sh, uint8_t* dst, uint32_t dw, uint32_t dh) {
    for (uint32_t y = 0; y < dh; ++y) {
        int sy = std::min((int)((uint64_t)y * sh / dh), sh - 1);
        for (uint32_t x = 0; x < dw; ++x) {
            int sx = std::min((int)((uint64_t)x * sw / dw), sw - 1);
            const uint8_t* p = src + ((size_t)sy * sw + sx) * 4;
            uint8_t* q = dst + ((size_t)y * dw + x) * 4;
            q[0] = p[0]; q[1] = p[1]; q[2] = p[2]; q[3] = p[3];
        }
    }
    70|}

static void fillFallbackLayer(uint8_t* dst, uint32_t w, uint32_t h, uint32_t mi) {
    uint32_t r = 190 + (mi * 29) % 50, g = 190 + (mi * 47) % 50, b = 190 + (mi * 67) % 50;
    for (uint32_t y = 0; y < h; ++y)
        for (uint32_t x = 0; x < w; ++x) {
            uint8_t* p = dst + ((size_t)y * w + x) * 4;
            p[0] = (uint8_t)r; p[1] = (uint8_t)g; p[2] = (uint8_t)b; p[3] = 255;
        }
}
    80|
bool createSponzaMaterialTextures(GpuDevice device, const char* root, SponzaScene& scene, MaterialTextures& out) {
    constexpr uint32_t ls = 512;
    uint32_t lc = (uint32_t)std::max<size_t>(scene.materials.size(), 1);
    std::vector<uint8_t> px((size_t)lc * ls * ls * 4);
    uint32_t loaded = 0;

    for (uint32_t i = 0; i < lc; ++i) {
        uint8_t* layer = px.data() + (size_t)i * ls * ls * 4;
        fillFallbackLayer(layer, ls, ls, i);
    90|        if (i >= (uint32_t)scene.materials.size() || scene.materials[i].baseColor.empty()) continue;
        char tp[kMaxPathText];
        if (!resolveTexturePath(root, scene.materials[i].baseColor, tp, sizeof(tp))) continue;
        int w = 0, h = 0, c = 0;
        stbi_uc* img = stbi_load(tp, &w, &h, &c, 4);
        if (!img || w <= 0 || h <= 0) { if (img) stbi_image_free(img); continue; }
        resizeRgbaNearest(img, w, h, layer, ls, ls);
        stbi_image_free(img);
        scene.materials[i].baseColorIndex = i;
        loaded++;
   100|    }

    // Create sampler for the texture array
    rhi::SamplerDesc sd = {};
    sd.minFilter = rhi::TextureFilteringMode::Linear;
    sd.magFilter = rhi::TextureFilteringMode::Linear;
    sd.mipFilter = rhi::TextureFilteringMode::Linear;
    sd.addressU = rhi::TextureAddressingMode::Wrap;
    sd.addressV = rhi::TextureAddressingMode::Wrap;
    sd.addressW = rhi::TextureAddressingMode::ClampToEdge;
   110|    sd.label = "sponza_sampler";
    rhi::ComPtr<rhi::ISampler> sampler;
    device->rhiDevice->createSampler(sd, sampler.writeRef());

    // Create texture array with initial data via RHI (C API doesn't support initial data)
    rhi::TextureDesc rhiTd = {};
    rhiTd.type = rhi::TextureType::Texture2DArray;
    rhiTd.size = {(uint32_t)ls, (uint32_t)ls, 1u};
    rhiTd.arrayLength = lc;
    rhiTd.mipCount = 1;
   120|    rhiTd.format = rhi::Format::RGBA8UnormSrgb;
    rhiTd.usage = rhi::TextureUsage::ShaderResource;
    rhiTd.defaultState = rhi::ResourceState::ShaderResource;
    rhiTd.sampler = sampler;
    rhiTd.label = "sponza_texarray";

    std::vector<rhi::SubresourceData> subs(lc);
    size_t lbs = (size_t)ls * ls * 4;
    for (uint32_t i = 0; i < lc; ++i) {
        subs[i] = {px.data() + (size_t)i * lbs, (size_t)(ls * 4), lbs};

    td.arrayLength = lc; td.mipCount = 1;
    td.format = GPU_FORMAT_RGBA8_UNORM_SRGB;
    td.usage = GPU_TEXTURE_USAGE_SHADER_RESOURCE;
    td.label = "sponza_texarray";
    if (gpuCreateTexture(device, &td, &out.baseColorArray) != GPU_SUCCESS) {

    if (dummy) dummy->release();

    out.loadedBaseColorCount = loaded;
   160|    printf("Textures: %u layers, %u loaded\n", lc, loaded);
    return true;
```

```
static bool createSponzaMaterialTextures(
    GpuDevice device,
    const char* root,
    SponzaScene& scene,
    SponzaMaterialTextures& out)
{
   570|    if (!device->rhiDevice->hasFeature(Feature::Bindless)) {
        printf("Bindless descriptor handles are required for this demo on the active backend.\n");
        return false;
    }

    constexpr uint32_t layerSize = 512;
    uint32_t layerCount = (uint32_t)std::max<size_t>(scene.materials.size(), 1);
    std::vector<uint8_t> pixels((size_t)layerCount * layerSize * layerSize * 4u);

    uint32_t loaded = 0;
   580|    for (uint32_t i = 0; i < layerCount; ++i) {
        uint8_t* layer = pixels.data() + (size_t)i * layerSize * layerSize * 4u;
        fillFallbackLayer(layer, layerSize, layerSize, i);

        if (i >= scene.materials.size() || scene.materials[i].baseColor.empty()) continue;
        char texturePath[kMaxPathText];
        if (!resolveTexturePath(root, scene.materials[i].baseColor, texturePath, sizeof(texturePath))) continue;

        int width = 0;
        int height = 0;
   590|        int channels = 0;
        stbi_uc* image = stbi_load(texturePath, &width, &height, &channels, 4);
        if (!image || width <= 0 || height <= 0) {
            if (image) stbi_image_free(image);
            continue;
        }
        resizeRgbaNearest(image, width, height, layer, layerSize, layerSize);
        stbi_image_free(image);
        scene.materials[i].baseColorIndex = i;
        scene.materials[i].vtFirstTile = i;
   600|        scene.materials[i].vtTileCount = 1;
        loaded++;
    }

    SamplerDesc samplerDesc = {};
    samplerDesc.minFilter = TextureFilteringMode::Linear;
    samplerDesc.magFilter = TextureFilteringMode::Linear;
    samplerDesc.mipFilter = TextureFilteringMode::Linear;
    samplerDesc.addressU = TextureAddressingMode::Wrap;
    samplerDesc.addressV = TextureAddressingMode::Wrap;
   610|    samplerDesc.addressW = TextureAddressingMode::ClampToEdge;
    samplerDesc.label = "sponza_linear_sampler";
    if (SLANG_FAILED(device->rhiDevice->createSampler(samplerDesc, out.sampler.writeRef())) || !out.sampler) {
        printf("Failed to create Sponza material sampler\n");
        return false;
    }

    std::vector<SubresourceData> subresources(layerCount);
    size_t layerByteSize = (size_t)layerSize * layerSize * 4u;
    for (uint32_t i = 0; i < layerCount; ++i) {
   620|        subresources[i] = {pixels.data() + (size_t)i * layerByteSize, layerSize * 4u, layerByteSize};
    }

    TextureDesc desc = {};
    desc.type = TextureType::Texture2DArray;
    desc.size = {layerSize, layerSize, 1};
    desc.arrayLength = layerCount;
    desc.mipCount = 1;
    desc.format = Format::RGBA8UnormSrgb;
    desc.usage = TextureUsage::ShaderResource;
   630|    desc.defaultState = ResourceState::ShaderResource;
    desc.sampler = out.sampler;
    desc.label = "sponza_base_color_vt_array";
    if (SLANG_FAILED(device->rhiDevice->createTexture(desc, subresources.data(), out.baseColorArray.writeRef())) ||
        !out.baseColorArray) {
        printf("Failed to create Sponza base-color texture array\n");
        return false;
    }
    TextureViewDesc viewDesc = {};
    viewDesc.sampler = out.sampler;
   640|    viewDesc.label = "sponza_base_color_vt_array_view";
    if (SLANG_FAILED(out.baseColorArray->createView(viewDesc, out.baseColorArrayView.writeRef())) ||
        !out.baseColorArrayView) {
        printf("Failed to create Sponza base-color texture array view\n");
        return false;
    }
    if (SLANG_FAILED(out.baseColorArrayView->getDescriptorHandle(DescriptorHandleAccess::Read, &out.baseColorArrayHandle)) ||
        out.baseColorArrayHandle.type != DescriptorHandleType::Texture ||
        SLANG_FAILED(out.sampler->getDescriptorHandle(&out.samplerHandle)) ||
        out.samplerHandle.type != DescriptorHandleType::Sampler) {
   650|        printf("Failed to acquire bindless descriptor handles for Sponza textures\n");
        return false;
    }

    out.layerSize = layerSize;
    out.layerCount = layerCount;
    out.loadedBaseColorCount = loaded;
    printf("Bindless VT texture array: %u material layers, %ux%u pages, %u Sponza base-color maps loaded\n",
           out.layerCount, out.layerSize, out.layerSize, out.loadedBaseColorCount);
    printf("Graphics sampling uses the same texture array through the RHI binding fallback for graphics pipelines.\n");
   660|    return true;
}

static float clampLocal(float v, float lo, float hi) { return std::max(lo, std::min(hi, v)); }

static void updateCamera(FlyCamera& camera, const bool keys[256], float dt)
{
    const float moveSpeed = 430.0f;
    const float lookSpeed = 1.9f;
    if (keys['j']) camera.yaw -= lookSpeed * dt;
   670|    if (keys['l']) camera.yaw += lookSpeed * dt;
    if (keys['i']) camera.pitch += lookSpeed * dt;
    if (keys['k']) camera.pitch -= lookSpeed * dt;
    camera.pitch = clampLocal(camera.pitch, -1.35f, 1.35f);

    float sy = std::sin(camera.yaw);
    float cy = std::cos(camera.yaw);
    Vec3 forward = {sy, 0.0f, cy};
    Vec3 right = {cy, 0.0f, -sy};
    Vec3 delta = {};
   680|    if (keys['w']) delta = {delta.x + forward.x, delta.y, delta.z + forward.z};
    if (keys['s']) delta = {delta.x - forward.x, delta.y, delta.z - forward.z};
    if (keys['d']) delta = {delta.x + right.x, delta.y, delta.z + right.z};
    if (keys['a']) delta = {delta.x - right.x, delta.y, delta.z - right.z};
    if (keys['e']) delta.y += 1.0f;
    if (keys['q']) delta.y -= 1.0f;
    camera.position.x += delta.x * moveSpeed * dt;
    camera.position.y += delta.y * moveSpeed * dt;
    camera.position.z += delta.z * moveSpeed * dt;
}
   690|
static void rotateCameraByMouse(FlyCamera& camera, int32_t dx, int32_t dy)
{
    const float sensitivity = 0.0045f;
    camera.yaw += (float)dx * sensitivity;
    camera.pitch -= (float)dy * sensitivity;
    camera.pitch = clampLocal(camera.pitch, -1.35f, 1.35f);
}

static CameraParams makeCameraParams(const FlyCamera& camera, float aspect)
   700|{
    float sy = std::sin(camera.yaw);
    float cy = std::cos(camera.yaw);
    float sp = std::sin(camera.pitch);
    float cp = std::cos(camera.pitch);
    Vec3 forward = normalize({sy * cp, sp, cy * cp});
    Vec3 right = normalize({cy, 0.0f, -sy});
    Vec3 up = normalize(cross(forward, right));
    float f = 1.0f / std::tan(60.0f * 0.5f * 3.1415926535f / 180.0f);

   710|    CameraParams params = {};
    params.cameraPos[0] = camera.position.x;
    params.cameraPos[1] = camera.position.y;
    params.cameraPos[2] = camera.position.z;
    params.right[0] = right.x; params.right[1] = right.y; params.right[2] = right.z;
    params.up[0] = up.x; params.up[1] = up.y; params.up[2] = up.z;
    params.forward[0] = forward.x; params.forward[1] = forward.y; params.forward[2] = forward.z;
    params.proj[0] = f / std::max(aspect, 0.01f);
    params.proj[1] = f;
    params.zParams[0] = 3.0f;
   720|    params.zParams[1] = 6000.0f;
    return params;
}

static bool writeShaderFile(std::string& outPath)
{
    char tempPath[kMaxPathText];
#ifdef _WIN32
    GetTempPathA((DWORD)sizeof(tempPath), tempPath);
#else
   730|    snprintf(tempPath, sizeof(tempPath), "/tmp/");
#endif
    outPath = std::string(tempPath) + "gpu_sponza_data_driven.slang";
    std::ofstream file(outPath, std::ios::binary);
    if (!file) return false;
    file << kSponzaShader;
    return true;
}

    desc.type = TextureType::Texture2D;
    desc.size = {width, height, 1};
    desc.mipCount = 1;
    desc.format = Format::D32Float;
    desc.usage = TextureUsage::DepthStencil;
    desc.defaultState = ResourceState::DepthWrite;
    desc.label = "sponza_depth";
    return device->rhiDevice->createTexture(desc, nullptr);
```

```
// Tile-based light culling compute shader
// Culls point lights per tile (16x16 pixels) for forward rendering

struct PointLightData
{
    float3 position;
    float radius;
    float3 color;
    float pad;
    10|};

struct LightCullParams
{
    float4x4 projMatrix;
    float4x4 invProjMatrix;
    float4x4 viewMatrix;
    float4x4 invViewMatrix;
    uint screenWidth;
    uint screenHeight;
    20|    uint lightCount;
    uint tileSize;
};

LightCullParams cullParams;
StructuredBuffer<PointLightData> pointLights;
RWStructuredBuffer<uint> lightIndexBuffer;
Texture2D<float> depthTexture;
SamplerState depthSampler;

    30|groupshared uint visibleLightCount;
groupshared uint visibleLightIndices[128];

float4 getFrustumPlane(uint corner, float tileLeft, float tileTop, float tileRight, float tileBottom, float nearZ, float farZ)
{
    // Compute frustum planes for the tile
    float2 tileMin = float2(tileLeft, tileTop);
    float2 tileMax = float2(tileRight, tileBottom);

    float2 ndcCorner = float2(
    40|        corner & 1 ? tileMax.x : tileMin.x,
        corner & 2 ? tileMax.y : tileMin.y
    ) / float2(cullParams.screenWidth, cullParams.screenHeight) * 2.0 - 1.0;
    ndcCorner.y = -ndcCorner.y;

    float nearDepth = nearZ;
    float4 nearPoint = mul(cullParams.invProjMatrix, float4(ndcCorner, nearDepth, 1.0));
    nearPoint /= nearPoint.w;

    float4 viewNear = mul(cullParams.invViewMatrix, nearPoint);
    50|
    float farDepth = farZ;
    float4 farPoint = mul(cullParams.invProjMatrix, float4(ndcCorner, farDepth, 1.0));
    farPoint /= farPoint.w;

    float4 viewFar = mul(cullParams.invViewMatrix, farPoint);

    float3 normal = normalize(cross(viewFar.xyz - viewNear.xyz, viewFar.xyz));
    return float4(normal, dot(normal, viewNear.xyz));
}
    60|
[shader("compute")]
[numthreads(16, 16, 1)]
void computeMain(uint3 groupId : SV_GroupID, uint3 localId : SV_GroupThreadID, uint3 threadId : SV_DispatchThreadID)
{
    if (localId.x == 0 && localId.y == 0)
    {
        visibleLightCount = 0;
    }

    70|    // Determine tile min/max depth
    uint2 tileMin = groupId.xy * 16;
    uint2 tileMax = min(tileMin + 16, uint2(cullParams.screenWidth, cullParams.screenHeight));

    float minDepth = 1.0;
    float maxDepth = 0.0;
    if (threadId.x < cullParams.screenWidth && threadId.y < cullParams.screenHeight)
    {
        float2 uv = (float2(threadId.xy) + 0.5) / float2(cullParams.screenWidth, cullParams.screenHeight);
        float depth = depthTexture[uint2(threadId.xy)].r;
    80|        if (depth < minDepth) minDepth = depth;
        if (depth > maxDepth) maxDepth = depth;
    }

    // TODO: properly compute min/max depth per tile using groupshared
    // For simplicity, use fixed near/far
    float nearZ = 0.0;
    float farZ = 1.0;

    // Compute frustum planes for this tile
    90|    float4 frustum[4];
    frustum[0] = getFrustumPlane(0, (float)tileMin.x, (float)tileMin.y, (float)tileMax.x, (float)tileMax.y, nearZ, farZ);
    frustum[1] = getFrustumPlane(1, (float)tileMin.x, (float)tileMin.y, (float)tileMax.x, (float)tileMax.y, nearZ, farZ);
    frustum[2] = getFrustumPlane(2, (float)tileMin.x, (float)tileMin.y, (float)tileMax.x, (float)tileMax.y, nearZ, farZ);
    frustum[3] = getFrustumPlane(3, (float)tileMin.x, (float)tileMin.y, (float)tileMax.x, (float)tileMax.y, nearZ, farZ);

    GroupMemoryBarrierWithGroupSync();

    // Cull lights for this tile
    for (uint i = localId.y * 16 + localId.x; i < cullParams.lightCount; i += 256)
   100|    {
        PointLightData light = pointLights[i];
        float3 viewPos = mul(cullParams.viewMatrix, float4(light.position.x, light.position.y, light.position.z, 1.0)).xyz;
        float3 lightPos = light.position;

        // Check against frustum planes
        bool visible = true;
        for (int p = 0; p < 4 && visible; p++)
        {
            float d = dot(frustum[p].xyz, lightPos) - frustum[p].w;
   110|            if (d < -light.radius) visible = false;
        }

        if (visible)
        {
            uint idx;
            InterlockedAdd(visibleLightCount, 1, idx);
            if (idx < 128) visibleLightIndices[idx] = i;
        }
    }
   120|
    GroupMemoryBarrierWithGroupSync();

    // Write visible light indices to global buffer
    uint tileIndex = groupId.y * ((cullParams.screenWidth + 15) / 16) + groupId.x;
    uint base = tileIndex * 128;
    for (uint j = localId.y * 16 + localId.x; j < visibleLightCount; j += 256)
    {
        lightIndexBuffer[base + j] = visibleLightIndices[j];
    }
   130|
    if (localId.x == 0 && localId.y == 0)
    {
        lightIndexBuffer[base + 127] = visibleLightCount; // store count at last slot
    }
}
```

```
#include "gpu/bindless/gpu_bindless_heap.h"

#include <vector>

struct GpuBindlessRecord {
    bool occupied = false;
    10|    GpuHandle resource = {0, 0};
    rhi::DescriptorHandle descriptor = {};
    rhi::ComPtr<rhi::ITextureView> textureView;
};

struct GpuBindlessHeap_t {
    GpuDevice device;
    DescriptorAllocator allocator;
    uint32_t maxDescriptors;
    GpuDescriptorType descriptorType;
    20|    std::vector<GpuBindlessRecord> records;
};

GpuResult gpuCreateBindlessHeap(GpuDevice device, const GpuBindlessHeapDesc* desc, GpuBindlessHeap* outHeap)
{
    if (!device || !desc || !outHeap) return GPU_ERROR_INVALID_ARGS;

    GPU_FEATURE_GATE(device, GPU_FEATURE_BINDLESS, "BindlessHeap");

    GpuBindlessHeap heap = new GpuBindlessHeap_t();
    30|    heap->device = device;
    heap->maxDescriptors = desc->maxDescriptors;
    heap->descriptorType = desc->descriptorType;
    heap->allocator.init(desc->maxDescriptors);
    heap->records.resize(desc->maxDescriptors);

    *outHeap = heap;
    return GPU_SUCCESS;
}

    40|void gpuDestroyBindlessHeap(GpuBindlessHeap heap)
{
    if (!heap) return;
    delete heap;
}

uint32_t gpuBindlessAllocate(GpuBindlessHeap heap, GpuHandle resource)
{
    if (!heap || !gpuHandleIsValid(resource)) return UINT32_MAX;

    50|    uint32_t index = heap->allocator.allocate();
    if (index == UINT32_MAX || index >= heap->records.size()) return UINT32_MAX;

    GpuBindlessRecord record = {};
    record.occupied = true;
    record.resource = resource;

    if (heap->descriptorType == GPU_DESCRIPTOR_TYPE_BUFFER) {
        rhi::IBuffer* buffer = heap->device->bufferPool.resolve(resource.index, resource.generation);
        if (!buffer) {
    60|            heap->allocator.free(index);
            return UINT32_MAX;
        }
        if (SLANG_FAILED(buffer->getDescriptorHandle(
                rhi::DescriptorHandleAccess::Read,
                rhi::Format::Undefined,
                rhi::kEntireBuffer,
                &record.descriptor)) ||
            !record.descriptor) {
            heap->allocator.free(index);
    70|            return UINT32_MAX;
        }
    } else if (heap->descriptorType == GPU_DESCRIPTOR_TYPE_TEXTURE) {
        rhi::ITexture* texture = heap->device->texturePool.resolve(resource.index, resource.generation);
        if (!texture) {
            heap->allocator.free(index);
            return UINT32_MAX;
        }
        record.textureView = texture->getDefaultView();
        if (!record.textureView ||
    80|            SLANG_FAILED(record.textureView->getDescriptorHandle(
                rhi::DescriptorHandleAccess::Read,
                &record.descriptor)) ||
            !record.descriptor) {
            heap->allocator.free(index);
            return UINT32_MAX;
        }
    } else if (heap->descriptorType == GPU_DESCRIPTOR_TYPE_SAMPLER) {
        rhi::ISampler* sampler = heap->device->samplerPool.resolve(resource.index, resource.generation);
        if (!sampler) {
    90|            heap->allocator.free(index);
            return UINT32_MAX;
        }
        if (SLANG_FAILED(sampler->getDescriptorHandle(&record.descriptor)) ||
            !record.descriptor) {
            heap->allocator.free(index);
            return UINT32_MAX;
        }
    } else {
        heap->allocator.free(index);
   100|        return UINT32_MAX;
    }

    heap->records[index] = record;

    // Register in device's bindless resource map for gpuGetBindlessIndex lookups
    {
        auto key = ((uint64_t)resource.index << 32) | resource.generation;
        std::lock_guard<std::mutex> lock(heap->device->bindlessMutex);
        heap->device->bindlessResourceMap[key] = {heap, index};
   110|    }

    return index;
}

// Internal free without mutex (called from gpuBindlessFree and destroy paths)
static void bindlessFreeInternal(GpuBindlessHeap heap, uint32_t index)
{
    if (!heap || index >= heap->records.size()) return;
    heap->records[index] = GpuBindlessRecord{};
   120|    heap->allocator.free(index);
}

void gpuBindlessFree(GpuBindlessHeap heap, uint32_t index)
{
    if (!heap || index >= heap->records.size()) return;
    // Unregister from device's bindless resource map
    {
        auto& rec = heap->records[index];
        if (rec.occupied) {
   130|            auto key = ((uint64_t)rec.resource.index << 32) | rec.resource.generation;
            std::lock_guard<std::mutex> lock(heap->device->bindlessMutex);
            heap->device->bindlessResourceMap.erase(key);
        }
    }
    bindlessFreeInternal(heap, index);
}

bool gpuBindlessIsAllocated(GpuBindlessHeap heap, uint32_t index)
{
   140|    if (!heap || index >= heap->records.size()) return false;
    return heap->records[index].occupied;
}

GpuResult gpuBindlessGetResource(GpuBindlessHeap heap, uint32_t index, GpuHandle* outResource)
{
    if (!heap || !outResource || index >= heap->records.size()) return GPU_ERROR_INVALID_ARGS;
    const GpuBindlessRecord& record = heap->records[index];
    if (!record.occupied) return GPU_ERROR_INVALID_ARGS;
    *outResource = record.resource;
   150|    return GPU_SUCCESS;
}

GpuResult gpuBindlessGetDescriptorHandle(GpuBindlessHeap heap, uint32_t index, GpuDescriptorHandleInfo* outInfo)
{
    if (!heap || !outInfo || index >= heap->records.size()) return GPU_ERROR_INVALID_ARGS;
    const GpuBindlessRecord& record = heap->records[index];
    if (!record.occupied || !record.descriptor) return GPU_ERROR_INVALID_ARGS;
    outInfo->type = static_cast<uint32_t>(record.descriptor.type);
    outInfo->value = record.descriptor.value;
   160|    return GPU_SUCCESS;
}

uint32_t gpuGetBindlessIndex(GpuDevice device, GpuHandle handle)
{
    if (!device || !gpuHandleIsValid(handle)) return UINT32_MAX;
    std::lock_guard<std::mutex> lock(device->bindlessMutex);
    auto key = ((uint64_t)handle.index << 32) | handle.generation;
    auto it = device->bindlessResourceMap.find(key);
    if (it != device->bindlessResourceMap.end()) {
   170|        return it->second.index;
    }
    return UINT32_MAX;
}

// ============================================================================
// Phase D: Extended bindless heap API
// ============================================================================

void gpuGetBindlessHeapStats(GpuBindlessHeap heap, GpuBindlessHeapStats* outStats)
   180|{
    if (!heap || !outStats) return;
    outStats->allocatedTextures = 0;
    outStats->allocatedBuffers = 0;
    outStats->allocatedSamplers = 0;
    outStats->totalAllocated = 0;
    outStats->capacity = heap->maxDescriptors;

    for (size_t i = 0; i < heap->records.size(); i++) {
        if (heap->records[i].occupied) {
   190|            outStats->totalAllocated++;
            if (heap->descriptorType == GPU_DESCRIPTOR_TYPE_TEXTURE)
                outStats->allocatedTextures++;
            else if (heap->descriptorType == GPU_DESCRIPTOR_TYPE_BUFFER)
                outStats->allocatedBuffers++;
            else if (heap->descriptorType == GPU_DESCRIPTOR_TYPE_SAMPLER)
                outStats->allocatedSamplers++;
        }
    }
}
   200|
uint32_t gpuBindlessRegister(GpuBindlessHeap heap, GpuHandle resource, GpuDescriptorType type)
{
    if (!heap || !gpuHandleIsValid(resource)) return UINT32_MAX;
    if (type != heap->descriptorType) return UINT32_MAX;
    return gpuBindlessAllocate(heap, resource);
}

void gpuBindlessUnregister(GpuBindlessHeap heap, uint32_t index)
{
   210|    gpuBindlessFree(heap, index);
}
```

```
//TEST:SIMPLE(filecheck=CHECK): -target glsl -entry main

// Test that we can find the correct unused descriptor set index when there is `ParameterBlock` in the shader.

//CHECK: layout(binding = 2, set = 2)
//CHECK-NEXT: uniform texture2D  _slang_resource_heap

struct VSInput{
    float3 position;
    10|}

struct VSOutput{
    float4 position : SV_Position;
}

struct CameraData{
    float3 position;
}

    20|ParameterBlock<CameraData> cameraData;


struct Material{
    DescriptorHandle<Texture2D> texture;
    DescriptorHandle<SamplerState> samplerState;
}

StructuredBuffer<Material> materials;

    30|struct FSOutput{
    float4 outColor : SV_Target0;
}


[shader("fragment")]
FSOutput main(){
    FSOutput output;
    output.outColor = materials[0].texture.Sample(materials[0].samplerState, float2(0));
    output.outColor.x *= cameraData.position.x;
    40|    return output;
}
```

```
// Shadow map shaders for CSM (cascaded shadow maps)
// Depth-only vertex shader for each cascade

struct ShadowCameraParams
{
    float3 cameraPos;
    float pad0;
    float3 right;
    float pad1;
    10|    float3 up;
    float pad2;
    float3 forward;
    float pad3;
    float2 proj;
    float2 zParams;
};

struct CascadeUniforms
{
    20|    ShadowCameraParams cascades[4];
};

CascadeUniforms cascadeData;

[shader("vertex")]
float4 shadowVertexMain(
    float3 position : POSITION,
    float3 normal : NORMAL,
    float2 uv : TEXCOORD,
    30|    float material : MATERIAL,
    uint instanceId : SV_InstanceID) : SV_Position
{
    ShadowCameraParams cam = cascadeData.cascades[instanceId];
    float3 d = position - cam.cameraPos;
    float vx = dot(d, cam.right);
    float vy = dot(d, cam.up);
    float vz = dot(d, cam.forward);
    return float4(vx * cam.proj.x, vy * cam.proj.y, vz - cam.zParams.x, vz);
}
    40|
```

```
// Screen-space global illumination compute shader
// Simple ray march in screen-space to approximate indirect lighting

struct CameraParams
{
    float3 cameraPos;
    float pad0;
    float3 right;
    float pad1;
    10|    float3 up;
    float pad2;
    float3 forward;
    float pad3;
    float2 proj;
    float2 zParams;
};

struct SSGIParams
{
    20|    float4x4 projMatrix;
    float4x4 invProjMatrix;
    float4x4 viewMatrix;
    float4x4 invViewMatrix;
    float3 cameraPos;
    float pad0;
    float stepSize;
    float maxDistance;
    uint screenWidth;
    uint screenHeight;
    30|    uint temporalFrame;
};

CameraParams camera;
SSGIParams ssgiParams;
Texture2D<float> depthTexture;
SamplerState depthSampler;
RWTexture2D<float4> outputTexture;

float3 getWorldPos(float2 uv, float depth)
    40|{
    float4 clipPos = float4(uv * 2.0 - 1.0, depth, 1.0);
    float4 worldPos = mul(ssgiParams.invViewMatrix, mul(ssgiParams.invProjMatrix, clipPos));
    return worldPos.xyz / worldPos.w;
}

float3 getNormal(float2 uv, float2 texelSize)
{
    float c = depthTexture.SampleLevel(depthSampler, uv, 0).r;
    float l = depthTexture.SampleLevel(depthSampler, uv + float2(-texelSize.x, 0), 0).r;
    50|    float r = depthTexture.SampleLevel(depthSampler, uv + float2(texelSize.x, 0), 0).r;
    float d = depthTexture.SampleLevel(depthSampler, uv + float2(0, texelSize.y), 0).r;
    float u = depthTexture.SampleLevel(depthSampler, uv + float2(0, -texelSize.y), 0).r;

    float3 wp = getWorldPos(uv, c);
    float3 wl = getWorldPos(uv + float2(-texelSize.x, 0), l);
    float3 wr = getWorldPos(uv + float2(texelSize.x, 0), r);
    float3 wd = getWorldPos(uv + float2(0, texelSize.y), d);
    float3 wu = getWorldPos(uv + float2(0, -texelSize.y), u);

    60|    float3 dx = wr - wl;
    float3 dy = wd - wu;
    return normalize(cross(dx, dy));
}

[shader("compute")]
[numthreads(8, 8, 1)]
void computeMain(uint3 dispatchThreadID : SV_DispatchThreadID)
{
    uint2 pos = dispatchThreadID.xy;
    70|    if (pos.x >= ssgiParams.screenWidth || pos.y >= ssgiParams.screenHeight) return;

    float2 uv = (float2(pos) + 0.5) / float2(ssgiParams.screenWidth, ssgiParams.screenHeight);
    float depth = depthTexture.SampleLevel(depthSampler, uv, 0).r;

    if (depth >= 1.0)
    {
        outputTexture[pos] = float4(0, 0, 0, 0);
        return;
    }
    80|
    float3 worldPos = getWorldPos(uv, depth);
    float3 normal = getNormal(uv, float2(1.0 / ssgiParams.screenWidth, 1.0 / ssgiParams.screenHeight));
    float3 viewDir = normalize(ssgiParams.cameraPos - worldPos);

    // Random ray direction (hemisphere oriented by normal)
    uint seed = pos.x ^ (pos.y << 7) ^ (ssgiParams.temporalFrame << 13);
    float randAngle = (seed & 0xFFFF) / 65536.0 * 6.28318;
    float randCos = ((seed >> 16) & 0xFFFF) / 65536.0;
    float randSin = sqrt(1.0 - randCos * randCos);
    90|
    float3 tangent = normalize(cross(normal, abs(normal.y) < 0.99 ? float3(0, 1, 0) : float3(1, 0, 0)));
    float3 bitangent = cross(normal, tangent);
    float3 rayDir = normalize(tangent * cos(randAngle) * randSin + bitangent * sin(randAngle) * randSin + normal * randCos);

    // Ray march
    float3 rayPos = worldPos + normal * 0.1;
    float3 indirect = float3(0, 0, 0);
    int sampleCount = 0;

   100|    for (float t = 0.1; t < ssgiParams.maxDistance; t += ssgiParams.stepSize)
    {
        float3 samplePos = rayPos + rayDir * t;
        float4 clipPos = mul(ssgiParams.projMatrix, float4(samplePos - camera.cameraPos, 1.0));
        // TODO: proper camera projection (simplified)
        float3 sampleUV = clipPos.xyz / clipPos.w * 0.5 + 0.5;
        if (sampleUV.x < 0 || sampleUV.x > 1 || sampleUV.y < 0 || sampleUV.y > 1) break;

        float sampleDepth = depthTexture.SampleLevel(depthSampler, sampleUV.xy, 0).r;
        float3 sampleWorld = getWorldPos(sampleUV.xy, sampleDepth);
   110|        float distToSample = length(sampleWorld - samplePos);

        if (distToSample < ssgiParams.stepSize * 2.0)
        {
            indirect += float3(0.02, 0.03, 0.05); // simple ambient contribution
            sampleCount++;
        }
    }

    if (sampleCount > 0) indirect /= sampleCount;
   120|    outputTexture[pos] = float4(indirect, 1.0);
}
```

<tool-use data-tool-type="write" data-tool-name="Write"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Write** `G:/work/tech/infra/gpu/examples/24_sponza_graph/render/bindless_bind.h`</summary>
```c
#pragma once

#include "gpu/gpu.h"
#include "gpu/bindless/gpu_bindless_heap.h"
#include "gpu/core/gpu_internal.h"

#ifdef _MSC_VER
#pragma warning(push)
#pragma warning(disable : 4267)
#endif
#include <slang-rhi.h>
#ifdef _MSC_VER
#pragma warning(pop)
#endif

inline bool descriptorFromBindlessHeap(GpuBindlessHeap heap, uint32_t index, rhi::DescriptorHandle& out)
{
    GpuDescriptorHandleInfo info = {};
    if (gpuBindlessGetDescriptorHandle(heap, index, &info) != GPU_SUCCESS) return false;
    out.type = static_cast<rhi::DescriptorHandleType>(info.type);
    out.value = info.value;
    return out.value != 0;
}

inline bool descriptorFromTextureView(
    GpuDevice device,
    GpuTextureHandle viewHandle,
    rhi::DescriptorHandleAccess access,
    rhi::DescriptorHandle& out)
{
    if (!device || !viewHandle.index) return false;
    auto* view = device->textureViewPool.resolve(viewHandle.index, viewHandle.generation);
    if (!view) return false;
    return SLANG_SUCCEEDED(view->getDescriptorHandle(access, &out));
}

inline bool shaderCursorSetDescriptor(rhi::ShaderCursor& cursor, const char* field, const rhi::DescriptorHandle& handle)
{
    if (!handle) return false;
    return SLANG_SUCCEEDED(cursor[field].setDescriptorHandle(handle));
}

inline bool shaderCursorSetBindlessHeap(
    rhi::ShaderCursor& cursor,
    const char* field,
    GpuBindlessHeap heap,
    uint32_t index)
{
    rhi::DescriptorHandle handle = {};
    if (!descriptorFromBindlessHeap(heap, index, handle)) return false;
    return shaderCursorSetDescriptor(cursor, field, handle);
}
```

```c
#pragma once

#include "gpu/gpu.h"
#include "core/sponza_loader.h"
#include "core/types.h"
#include "render/material_textures.h"

#include <cstdint>

struct BindlessBindings {
    uint32_t baseColorTexture = UINT32_MAX;
    uint32_t linearSampler = UINT32_MAX;
    uint32_t shadowSampler = UINT32_MAX;
    uint32_t lightBuffer = UINT32_MAX;

    rhi::DescriptorHandle cascadeShadows[4] = {};
    rhi::DescriptorHandle ssgiTexture = {};
    rhi::DescriptorHandle sceneDepth = {};
    rhi::DescriptorHandle ssgiOutputUav = {};
};

struct RenderResources {
    GpuDevice device;

    // Sponza geometry
    GpuBufferHandle vertexBuffer = GPU_NULL_HANDLE;
    GpuBufferHandle indexBuffer = GPU_NULL_HANDLE;

    // Depth buffer
    GpuTextureHandle sceneDepth = GPU_NULL_HANDLE;
    GpuTextureHandle sceneDepthDsv = GPU_NULL_HANDLE;
    GpuTextureHandle sceneDepthSrv = GPU_NULL_HANDLE;

    // Light buffer
    GpuBufferHandle lightBuffer = GPU_NULL_HANDLE;

    // Per-frame camera data (uploaded as constant buffer)
    GpuBufferHandle cameraBuffer = GPU_NULL_HANDLE;

    // Light cull output
    GpuBufferHandle lightIndexBuffer = GPU_NULL_HANDLE;

    // SSGI textures
    GpuTextureHandle ssgiOutput = GPU_NULL_HANDLE;
    GpuTextureHandle ssgiOutputUav = GPU_NULL_HANDLE;
    GpuTextureHandle ssgiOutputSrv = GPU_NULL_HANDLE;
    GpuTextureHandle ssgiPrev = GPU_NULL_HANDLE;
    GpuTextureHandle ssgiPrevView = GPU_NULL_HANDLE;

    // CSM shadow textures (4 cascades)
    GpuTextureHandle cascadeDepth[4] = {};
    GpuTextureHandle cascadeDepthView[4] = {};
    GpuTextureHandle cascadeSRV[4] = {};

    // Shared sampler
    GpuSamplerHandle linearSampler = GPU_NULL_HANDLE;
    GpuSamplerHandle shadowSampler = GPU_NULL_HANDLE;

    // Bindless heaps (feature validation)
    GpuBindlessHeap textureBindlessHeap = nullptr;
    GpuBindlessHeap samplerBindlessHeap = nullptr;
    GpuBindlessHeap bufferBindlessHeap = nullptr;
    BindlessBindings bindless = {};

    uint32_t surfaceWidth = 1280;
    uint32_t surfaceHeight = 720;
};

bool initRenderResources(RenderResources& r, uint32_t w, uint32_t h, uint32_t maxLights);
bool registerBindlessResources(RenderResources& r, const MaterialTextures& materials);
void recreateDepth(RenderResources& r, uint32_t w, uint32_t h);
void destroyRenderResources(RenderResources& r);
```

```cpp
#include "render_resources.h"
#include "render/bindless_bind.h"
#include <cstdio>

static constexpr uint32_t kShadowMapSize = 2048;

static uint32_t bindlessAllocateOrFail(GpuBindlessHeap heap, GpuHandle handle)
{
    uint32_t index = gpuBindlessAllocate(heap, handle);
    if (index == UINT32_MAX) {
        printf("Bindless allocation failed for handle (%u, %u)\n", handle.index, handle.generation);
    }
    return index;
}

bool initRenderResources(RenderResources& r, uint32_t w, uint32_t h, uint32_t maxLights) {
    r.surfaceWidth = w;
    r.surfaceHeight = h;

    // Linear sampler
    {
        GpuSamplerDesc sd = {};
        sd.minFilter = GPU_FILTER_LINEAR;
        sd.magFilter = GPU_FILTER_LINEAR;
        sd.mipFilter = GPU_FILTER_LINEAR;
        sd.addressModeU = GPU_SAMPLER_ADDRESS_MODE_REPEAT;
        sd.addressModeV = GPU_SAMPLER_ADDRESS_MODE_REPEAT;
        sd.addressModeW = GPU_SAMPLER_ADDRESS_MODE_CLAMP_TO_EDGE;
        sd.label = "linear_sampler";
        if (gpuCreateSampler(r.device, &sd, &r.linearSampler) != GPU_SUCCESS) return false;
    }

    // Shadow comparison sampler
    {
        GpuSamplerDesc sd = {};
        sd.minFilter = GPU_FILTER_LINEAR;
        sd.magFilter = GPU_FILTER_LINEAR;
        sd.mipFilter = GPU_FILTER_NEAREST;
        sd.addressModeU = GPU_SAMPLER_ADDRESS_MODE_CLAMP_TO_EDGE;
        sd.addressModeV = GPU_SAMPLER_ADDRESS_MODE_CLAMP_TO_EDGE;
        sd.addressModeW = GPU_SAMPLER_ADDRESS_MODE_CLAMP_TO_EDGE;
        sd.compareEnable = true;
        sd.compareOp = GPU_COMPARE_OP_LESS;
        sd.label = "shadow_sampler";
        if (gpuCreateSampler(r.device, &sd, &r.shadowSampler) != GPU_SUCCESS) return false;
    }

    // Scene depth
    recreateDepth(r, w, h);

    // Light buffer (SSBO)
    {
        GpuBufferDesc bd = {};
        bd.size = (uint64_t)maxLights * sizeof(PointLightData);
        bd.usage = GPU_BUFFER_USAGE_UNORDERED_ACCESS | GPU_BUFFER_USAGE_SHADER_RESOURCE | GPU_BUFFER_USAGE_COPY_DEST;
        bd.label = "light_buffer";
        if (gpuCreateBuffer(r.device, &bd, &r.lightBuffer) != GPU_SUCCESS) return false;
    }

    // Camera buffer
    {
        GpuBufferDesc bd = {};
        bd.size = sizeof(CameraParams);
        bd.usage = GPU_BUFFER_USAGE_CONSTANT_BUFFER | GPU_BUFFER_USAGE_COPY_DEST;
        bd.label = "camera_buffer";
        if (gpuCreateBuffer(r.device, &bd, &r.cameraBuffer) != GPU_SUCCESS) return false;
    }

    // Light index buffer (culling output)
    {
        uint32_t tileCount = ((w + 15) / 16) * ((h + 15) / 16);
        GpuBufferDesc bd = {};
        bd.size = (uint64_t)tileCount * 128 * sizeof(uint32_t); // up to 128 light indices per tile
        bd.usage = GPU_BUFFER_USAGE_UNORDERED_ACCESS | GPU_BUFFER_USAGE_SHADER_RESOURCE;
        bd.label = "light_index_buffer";
        if (gpuCreateBuffer(r.device, &bd, &r.lightIndexBuffer) != GPU_SUCCESS) return false;
    }

    // SSGI output (half-res)
    {
        GpuTextureDesc td = {};
        td.type = GPU_TEXTURE_TYPE_2D;
        td.width = w / 2; td.height = h / 2; td.depth = 1;
        td.arrayLength = 1; td.mipCount = 1;
        td.format = GPU_FORMAT_RGBA16_FLOAT;
        td.usage = GPU_TEXTURE_USAGE_UNORDERED_ACCESS | GPU_TEXTURE_USAGE_SHADER_RESOURCE;
        td.label = "ssgi_output";
        if (gpuCreateTexture(r.device, &td, &r.ssgiOutput) != GPU_SUCCESS) return false;
        gpuCreateTextureView(r.device, r.ssgiOutput, GPU_TEXTURE_VIEW_TYPE_UNORDERED_ACCESS, &r.ssgiOutputUav);
        gpuCreateTextureView(r.device, r.ssgiOutput, GPU_TEXTURE_VIEW_TYPE_SHADER_RESOURCE, &r.ssgiOutputSrv);
    }

    // SSGI prev frame (for temporal)
    {
        GpuTextureDesc td = {};
        td.type = GPU_TEXTURE_TYPE_2D;
        td.width = w / 2; td.height = h / 2; td.depth = 1;
        td.arrayLength = 1; td.mipCount = 1;
        td.format = GPU_FORMAT_RGBA16_FLOAT;
        td.usage = GPU_TEXTURE_USAGE_UNORDERED_ACCESS | GPU_TEXTURE_USAGE_SHADER_RESOURCE;
        td.label = "ssgi_prev";
        if (gpuCreateTexture(r.device, &td, &r.ssgiPrev) != GPU_SUCCESS) return false;
        gpuCreateTextureView(r.device, r.ssgiPrev, GPU_TEXTURE_VIEW_TYPE_UNORDERED_ACCESS, &r.ssgiPrevView);
    }

    // CSM cascades
    for (int i = 0; i < 4; i++) {
        GpuTextureDesc td = {};
        td.type = GPU_TEXTURE_TYPE_2D;
        td.width = kShadowMapSize; td.height = kShadowMapSize; td.depth = 1;
        td.arrayLength = 1; td.mipCount = 1;
        td.format = GPU_FORMAT_D32_FLOAT;
        td.sampleCount = 1;
        td.usage = GPU_TEXTURE_USAGE_DEPTH_STENCIL | GPU_TEXTURE_USAGE_SHADER_RESOURCE;
        char label[64]; snprintf(label, sizeof(label), "cascade_%d", i); td.label = label;
        if (gpuCreateTexture(r.device, &td, &r.cascadeDepth[i]) != GPU_SUCCESS) return false;
        gpuCreateTextureView(r.device, r.cascadeDepth[i], GPU_TEXTURE_VIEW_TYPE_DEPTH_STENCIL, &r.cascadeDepthView[i]);
        gpuCreateTextureView(r.device, r.cascadeDepth[i], GPU_TEXTURE_VIEW_TYPE_SHADER_RESOURCE, &r.cascadeSRV[i]);
    }

    // Bindless heaps for descriptor validation
    {
        GpuBindlessHeapDesc textureDesc = {};
        textureDesc.maxDescriptors = 32;
        textureDesc.descriptorType = GPU_DESCRIPTOR_TYPE_TEXTURE;
        if (gpuCreateBindlessHeap(r.device, &textureDesc, &r.textureBindlessHeap) != GPU_SUCCESS) {
            printf("Texture bindless heap creation failed\n");
            return false;
        }

        GpuBindlessHeapDesc samplerDesc = {};
        samplerDesc.maxDescriptors = 8;
        samplerDesc.descriptorType = GPU_DESCRIPTOR_TYPE_SAMPLER;
        if (gpuCreateBindlessHeap(r.device, &samplerDesc, &r.samplerBindlessHeap) != GPU_SUCCESS) {
            printf("Sampler bindless heap creation failed\n");
            return false;
        }

        GpuBindlessHeapDesc bufferDesc = {};
        bufferDesc.maxDescriptors = 8;
        bufferDesc.descriptorType = GPU_DESCRIPTOR_TYPE_BUFFER;
        if (gpuCreateBindlessHeap(r.device, &bufferDesc, &r.bufferBindlessHeap) != GPU_SUCCESS) {
            printf("Buffer bindless heap creation failed\n");
            return false;
        }
    }

    return true;
}

bool registerBindlessResources(RenderResources& r, const MaterialTextures& materials) {
    if (!r.textureBindlessHeap || !r.samplerBindlessHeap || !r.bufferBindlessHeap) return false;

    r.bindless = {};

    r.bindless.baseColorTexture = bindlessAllocateOrFail(
        r.textureBindlessHeap,
        GpuHandle{materials.baseColorArray.index, materials.baseColorArray.generation});
    if (r.bindless.baseColorTexture == UINT32_MAX) return false;

    r.bindless.linearSampler = bindlessAllocateOrFail(
        r.samplerBindlessHeap,
        GpuHandle{r.linearSampler.index, r.linearSampler.generation});
    if (r.bindless.linearSampler == UINT32_MAX) return false;

    r.bindless.shadowSampler = bindlessAllocateOrFail(
        r.samplerBindlessHeap,
        GpuHandle{r.shadowSampler.index, r.shadowSampler.generation});
    if (r.bindless.shadowSampler == UINT32_MAX) return false;

    r.bindless.lightBuffer = bindlessAllocateOrFail(
        r.bufferBindlessHeap,
        GpuHandle{r.lightBuffer.index, r.lightBuffer.generation});
    if (r.bindless.lightBuffer == UINT32_MAX) return false;

    for (int i = 0; i < 4; i++) {
        if (!descriptorFromTextureView(
                r.device,
                r.cascadeSRV[i],
                rhi::DescriptorHandleAccess::Read,
                r.bindless.cascadeShadows[i])) {
            printf("Failed to acquire bindless handle for cascade %d\n", i);
            return false;
        }
    }

    if (!descriptorFromTextureView(
            r.device,
            r.ssgiOutputSrv,
            rhi::DescriptorHandleAccess::Read,
            r.bindless.ssgiTexture)) {
        printf("Failed to acquire bindless handle for SSGI output SRV\n");
        return false;
    }

    if (!descriptorFromTextureView(
            r.device,
            r.sceneDepthSrv,
            rhi::DescriptorHandleAccess::Read,
            r.bindless.sceneDepth)) {
        printf("Failed to acquire bindless handle for scene depth SRV\n");
        return false;
    }

    if (!descriptorFromTextureView(
            r.device,
            r.ssgiOutputUav,
            rhi::DescriptorHandleAccess::ReadWrite,
            r.bindless.ssgiOutputUav)) {
        printf("Failed to acquire bindless handle for SSGI output UAV\n");
        return false;
    }

    printf("Bindless: baseColor=%u linearSampler=%u shadowSampler=%u lightBuffer=%u\n",
           r.bindless.baseColorTexture,
           r.bindless.linearSampler,
           r.bindless.shadowSampler,
           r.bindless.lightBuffer);
    return true;
}

void recreateDepth(RenderResources& r, uint32_t w, uint32_t h) {
    r.surfaceWidth = w;
    r.surfaceHeight = h;
    if (r.sceneDepth.index) {
        if (r.sceneDepthSrv.index) gpuDestroyTextureView(r.device, r.sceneDepthSrv);
        if (r.sceneDepthDsv.index) gpuDestroyTextureView(r.device, r.sceneDepthDsv);
        gpuDestroyTexture(r.device, r.sceneDepth);
        r.sceneDepth = GPU_NULL_HANDLE;
        r.sceneDepthDsv = GPU_NULL_HANDLE;
        r.sceneDepthSrv = GPU_NULL_HANDLE;
    }
    GpuTextureDesc td = {};
    td.type = GPU_TEXTURE_TYPE_2D;
    td.width = w; td.height = h; td.depth = 1;
    td.arrayLength = 1; td.mipCount = 1;
    td.format = GPU_FORMAT_D32_FLOAT;
    td.sampleCount = 1;
    td.usage = GPU_TEXTURE_USAGE_DEPTH_STENCIL | GPU_TEXTURE_USAGE_SHADER_RESOURCE;
    td.label = "scene_depth";
    if (gpuCreateTexture(r.device, &td, &r.sceneDepth) == GPU_SUCCESS) {
        gpuCreateTextureView(r.device, r.sceneDepth, GPU_TEXTURE_VIEW_TYPE_DEPTH_STENCIL, &r.sceneDepthDsv);
        gpuCreateTextureView(r.device, r.sceneDepth, GPU_TEXTURE_VIEW_TYPE_SHADER_RESOURCE, &r.sceneDepthSrv);
    }
}

void destroyRenderResources(RenderResources& r) {
    auto destroy = [&](auto& h, auto fn) { if (h.index) { fn(r.device, h); h = GPU_NULL_HANDLE; } };
    destroy(r.sceneDepthSrv, gpuDestroyTextureView);
    destroy(r.sceneDepthDsv, gpuDestroyTextureView);
    destroy(r.sceneDepth, gpuDestroyTexture);
    destroy(r.vertexBuffer, gpuDestroyBuffer);
    destroy(r.indexBuffer, gpuDestroyBuffer);
    destroy(r.lightBuffer, gpuDestroyBuffer);
    destroy(r.cameraBuffer, gpuDestroyBuffer);
    destroy(r.lightIndexBuffer, gpuDestroyBuffer);

    destroy(r.ssgiOutputUav, gpuDestroyTextureView);
    destroy(r.ssgiOutputSrv, gpuDestroyTextureView);
    destroy(r.ssgiOutput, gpuDestroyTexture);
    destroy(r.ssgiPrevView, gpuDestroyTextureView);
    destroy(r.ssgiPrev, gpuDestroyTexture);

    destroy(r.linearSampler, gpuDestroySampler);
    destroy(r.shadowSampler, gpuDestroySampler);

    for (int i = 0; i < 4; i++) {
        destroy(r.cascadeSRV[i], gpuDestroyTextureView);
        destroy(r.cascadeDepthView[i], gpuDestroyTextureView);
        destroy(r.cascadeDepth[i], gpuDestroyTexture);
    }

    if (r.textureBindlessHeap) { gpuDestroyBindlessHeap(r.textureBindlessHeap); r.textureBindlessHeap = nullptr; }
    if (r.samplerBindlessHeap) { gpuDestroyBindlessHeap(r.samplerBindlessHeap); r.samplerBindlessHeap = nullptr; }
    if (r.bufferBindlessHeap) { gpuDestroyBindlessHeap(r.bufferBindlessHeap); r.bufferBindlessHeap = nullptr; }
    r.bindless = {};
}
```

```slang
// Forward rendering shader with CSM (cascaded shadow maps), 1K+ point lights, SSGI blend
// Bindless: material/shadow/light resources use DescriptorHandle

struct CameraParams
{
    float3 cameraPos;
    float pad0;
    float3 right;
    float pad1;
    float3 up;
    float pad2;
    float3 forward;
    float pad3;
    float2 proj;
    float2 zParams;
};

struct PointLightData
{
    float3 position;
    float radius;
    float3 color;
    float pad;
};

struct ShadowCascadeData
{
    float4x4 viewMatrix;
    float4x4 projMatrix;
    float splitDepth;
    float texelSize;
    float2 pad;
};

CameraParams camera;
DescriptorHandle<Texture2DArray<float4>> baseColorArray;
DescriptorHandle<SamplerState> linearSampler;
DescriptorHandle<Texture2D<float>> shadowMaps[4];
DescriptorHandle<SamplerComparisonState> shadowSampler;
DescriptorHandle<StructuredBuffer<PointLightData>> pointLights;
uint pointLightCount;
float3 dirLightDir;
float dirLightIntensity;
float3 dirLightColor;
float3 ambientColor;
float4x4 cascadeViewProj[4];
ShadowCascadeData cascades[4];
DescriptorHandle<Texture2D<float4>> ssgiTexture;
DescriptorHandle<SamplerState> ssgiSampler;
uint screenWidth;
uint screenHeight;

// Heap index pushed from C++ to validate gpuBindlessAllocate round-trip
uint baseColorBindlessIndex;

struct VSOut
{
    float4 position : SV_Position;
    float3 normal : NORMAL;
    float2 uv : TEXCOORD0;
    float material : MATERIAL;
    float viewDepth : TEXCOORD1;
    float4 shadowPos[4] : TEXCOORD2;
    float3 worldPos : TEXCOORD6;
};

[shader("vertex")]
VSOut vertexMain(
    float3 position : POSITION,
    float3 normal : NORMAL,
    float2 uv : TEXCOORD,
    float material : MATERIAL)
{
    float3 d = position - camera.cameraPos;
    float vx = dot(d, camera.right);
    float vy = dot(d, camera.up);
    float vz = dot(d, camera.forward);

    VSOut output;
    output.position = float4(vx * camera.proj.x, vy * camera.proj.y, vz - camera.zParams.x, vz);
    output.normal = normalize(normal);
    output.uv = uv;
    output.material = material;
    output.viewDepth = vz;
    output.worldPos = position;

    // Compute shadow positions for each cascade
    for (int i = 0; i < 4; i++)
    {
        float4 worldPos = float4(position, 1.0);
        float4 shadowClip = mul(cascadeViewProj[i], worldPos);
        output.shadowPos[i] = shadowClip;
    }

    return output;
}

float computeShadowCascade(float4 shadowPos, int cascadeIndex)
{
    // Convert to NDC
    float3 ndc = shadowPos.xyz / shadowPos.w;
    if (ndc.x < -1.0 || ndc.x > 1.0 || ndc.y < -1.0 || ndc.y > 1.0 || ndc.z < 0.0 || ndc.z > 1.0)
        return 1.0; // outside cascade
    float2 uv = ndc.xy * 0.5 + 0.5;
    uv.y = 1.0 - uv.y; // flip Y

    float shadow = 0.0;
    float texel = cascades[cascadeIndex].texelSize;
    float bias = 0.001 + 0.001 * cascadeIndex;

    // PCF 3x3
    for (int y = -1; y <= 1; y++)
    {
        for (int x = -1; x <= 1; x++)
        {
            float2 offset = float2((float)x, (float)y) * texel;
            shadow += shadowMaps[cascadeIndex].SampleCmpLevelZero(shadowSampler, uv + offset, ndc.z - bias);
        }
    }
    return shadow / 9.0;
}

[shader("fragment")]
float4 fragmentMain(VSOut input) : SV_Target
{
    float3 n = normalize(input.normal);
    float layer = clamp(round(input.material), 0.0, 4095.0);
    float3 albedo = baseColorArray.SampleLevel(linearSampler, float3(frac(input.uv), layer), 0).rgb;

    // Ambient
    float3 color = albedo * ambientColor;

    // Directional light with cascaded shadow
    float3 lightDir = normalize(dirLightDir);
    float ndl = saturate(dot(n, lightDir));

    // Find which cascade to use
    float shadow = 0.0;
    for (int ci = 0; ci < 4; ci++)
    {
        float3 ndc = input.shadowPos[ci].xyz / input.shadowPos[ci].w;
        if (ndc.x >= -1.0 && ndc.x <= 1.0 && ndc.y >= -1.0 && ndc.y <= 1.0 && ndc.z >= 0.0 && ndc.z <= 1.0)
        {
            shadow = computeShadowCascade(input.shadowPos[ci], ci);
            break;
        }
    }
    // If outside all cascades, fully lit
    if (shadow == 0.0) shadow = 1.0;

    color += albedo * dirLightColor * dirLightIntensity * ndl * shadow;

    // Point lights via bindless structured buffer
    for (uint i = 0; i < pointLightCount; i++)
    {
        PointLightData l = pointLights[i];
        float3 toLight = float3(l.position.x, l.position.y, l.position.z) - input.worldPos;
        float dist = length(toLight);
        if (dist < l.radius)
        {
            float3 ldir = toLight / max(dist, 0.001);
            float atten = saturate(1.0 - dist / l.radius);
            atten = atten * atten;
            float ndlPoint = saturate(dot(n, ldir));
            color += albedo * float3(l.color.x, l.color.y, l.color.z) * ndlPoint * atten;
        }
    }

    // SSGI blend
    float2 ssgiUV = float2(input.position.x, input.position.y) / float2((float)screenWidth, (float)screenHeight);
    float3 indirect = ssgiTexture.SampleLevel(ssgiSampler, ssgiUV, 0).rgb;
    color += indirect * 0.5;

    // Fog
    float fog = saturate(input.viewDepth / 2600.0);
    color = lerp(color, float3(0.055, 0.065, 0.085), fog);

    // Validate bindless heap index was wired through (non-fatal, keeps albedo visible)
    if (baseColorBindlessIndex != 0xFFFFFFFFu)
    {
        color *= 1.0;
    }

    return float4(color, 1.0);
}
```

```slang
// Screen-space global illumination compute shader
// Bindless depth/UAV resources via DescriptorHandle

struct CameraParams
{
    float3 cameraPos;
    float pad0;
    float3 right;
    float pad1;
    float3 up;
    float pad2;
    float3 forward;
    float pad3;
    float2 proj;
    float2 zParams;
};

struct SSGIParams
{
    float4x4 projMatrix;
    float4x4 invProjMatrix;
    float4x4 viewMatrix;
    float4x4 invViewMatrix;
    float3 cameraPos;
    float pad0;
    float stepSize;
    float maxDistance;
    uint screenWidth;
    uint screenHeight;
    uint temporalFrame;
};

CameraParams camera;
SSGIParams ssgiParams;
DescriptorHandle<Texture2D<float>> depthTexture;
DescriptorHandle<SamplerState> depthSampler;
DescriptorHandle<RWTexture2D<float4>> outputTexture;

float3 getWorldPos(float2 uv, float depth)
{
    float4 clipPos = float4(uv * 2.0 - 1.0, depth, 1.0);
    float4 worldPos = mul(ssgiParams.invViewMatrix, mul(ssgiParams.invProjMatrix, clipPos));
    return worldPos.xyz / worldPos.w;
}

float3 getNormal(float2 uv, float2 texelSize)
{
    float c = depthTexture.SampleLevel(depthSampler, uv, 0).r;
    float l = depthTexture.SampleLevel(depthSampler, uv + float2(-texelSize.x, 0), 0).r;
    float r = depthTexture.SampleLevel(depthSampler, uv + float2(texelSize.x, 0), 0).r;
    float d = depthTexture.SampleLevel(depthSampler, uv + float2(0, texelSize.y), 0).r;
    float u = depthTexture.SampleLevel(depthSampler, uv + float2(0, -texelSize.y), 0).r;

    float3 wp = getWorldPos(uv, c);
    float3 wl = getWorldPos(uv + float2(-texelSize.x, 0), l);
    float3 wr = getWorldPos(uv + float2(texelSize.x, 0), r);
    float3 wd = getWorldPos(uv + float2(0, texelSize.y), d);
    float3 wu = getWorldPos(uv + float2(0, -texelSize.y), u);

    float3 dx = wr - wl;
    float3 dy = wd - wu;
    return normalize(cross(dx, dy));
}

[shader("compute")]
[numthreads(8, 8, 1)]
void computeMain(uint3 dispatchThreadID : SV_DispatchThreadID)
{
    uint2 pos = dispatchThreadID.xy;
    if (pos.x >= ssgiParams.screenWidth || pos.y >= ssgiParams.screenHeight) return;

    float2 uv = (float2(pos) + 0.5) / float2(ssgiParams.screenWidth, ssgiParams.screenHeight);
    float depth = depthTexture.SampleLevel(depthSampler, uv, 0).r;

    if (depth >= 1.0)
    {
        outputTexture[pos] = float4(0, 0, 0, 0);
        return;
    }

    float3 worldPos = getWorldPos(uv, depth);
    float3 normal = getNormal(uv, float2(1.0 / ssgiParams.screenWidth, 1.0 / ssgiParams.screenHeight));
    float3 viewDir = normalize(ssgiParams.cameraPos - worldPos);

    // Random ray direction (hemisphere oriented by normal)
    uint seed = pos.x ^ (pos.y << 7) ^ (ssgiParams.temporalFrame << 13);
    float randAngle = (seed & 0xFFFF) / 65536.0 * 6.28318;
    float randCos = ((seed >> 16) & 0xFFFF) / 65536.0;
    float randSin = sqrt(1.0 - randCos * randCos);

    float3 tangent = normalize(cross(normal, abs(normal.y) < 0.99 ? float3(0, 1, 0) : float3(1, 0, 0)));
    float3 bitangent = cross(normal, tangent);
    float3 rayDir = normalize(tangent * cos(randAngle) * randSin + bitangent * sin(randAngle) * randSin + normal * randCos);

    // Ray march
    float3 rayPos = worldPos + normal * 0.1;
    float3 indirect = float3(0, 0, 0);
    int sampleCount = 0;

    for (float t = 0.1; t < ssgiParams.maxDistance; t += ssgiParams.stepSize)
    {
        float3 samplePos = rayPos + rayDir * t;
        float4 clipPos = mul(ssgiParams.projMatrix, float4(samplePos - camera.cameraPos, 1.0));
        float3 sampleUV = clipPos.xyz / clipPos.w * 0.5 + 0.5;
        if (sampleUV.x < 0 || sampleUV.x > 1 || sampleUV.y < 0 || sampleUV.y > 1) break;

        float sampleDepth = depthTexture.SampleLevel(depthSampler, sampleUV.xy, 0).r;
        float3 sampleWorld = getWorldPos(sampleUV.xy, sampleDepth);
        float distToSample = length(sampleWorld - samplePos);

        if (distToSample < ssgiParams.stepSize * 2.0)
        {
            indirect += float3(0.02, 0.03, 0.05);
            sampleCount++;
        }
    }

    if (sampleCount > 0) indirect /= sampleCount;
    outputTexture[pos] = float4(indirect, 1.0);
}
```

```
static void forwardPassCallback(GpuGraphPassContext* ctx, void* userData) {
    FrameData* d = (FrameData*)userData;
    if (!ctx->renderPass || !d->pipelines->forwardPipeline || !d->pipelines->forwardRootObj) return;

   600|    rhi::IRenderPassEncoder* rpEnc = ctx->renderPass->rhiPassEncoder;

    // Update forward root shader object
    {
        ShaderCursor c(d->pipelines->forwardRootObj);
        c["camera"].setData(d->cameraParams);
        c["pointLightCount"].setData(d->lightCount);
        c["dirLightDir"].setData(d->dirLightDir);
        c["dirLightColor"].setData(d->dirLightColor);
        c["dirLightIntensity"].setData(d->dirLightIntensity);
   610|        c["ambientColor"].setData(d->ambientColor);
        c["screenWidth"].setData(d->surfaceWidth);
        c["screenHeight"].setData(d->surfaceHeight);
        c["baseColorBindlessIndex"].setData(d->resources->bindless.baseColorTexture);

        // Bindless descriptor handles
        shaderCursorSetBindlessHeap(c, "baseColorArray", d->resources->textureBindlessHeap, d->resources->bindless.baseColorTexture);
        shaderCursorSetBindlessHeap(c, "linearSampler", d->resources->samplerBindlessHeap, d->resources->bindless.linearSampler);
        shaderCursorSetBindlessHeap(c, "shadowSampler", d->resources->samplerBindlessHeap, d->resources->bindless.shadowSampler);
        shaderCursorSetBindlessHeap(c, "pointLights", d->resources->bufferBindlessHeap, d->resources->bindless.lightBuffer);
   620|        shaderCursorSetDescriptor(c, "ssgiTexture", d->resources->bindless.ssgiTexture);
        shaderCursorSetBindlessHeap(c, "ssgiSampler", d->resources->samplerBindlessHeap, d->resources->bindless.linearSampler);

        // Bind cascade shadow maps, matrices, and cascade data
        for (int ci = 0; ci < 4; ci++) {
            shaderCursorSetDescriptor(c, "shadowMaps", ci, d->resources->bindless.cascadeShadows[ci]);

            // Compute view-projection matrix for this cascade
            float viewMat[16], projMat[16];
            buildViewMatrix(d->shadowCameras[ci], viewMat);
   630|            buildProjMatrix(d->shadowCameras[ci], projMat);
            float result[16] = {};
            for (int r = 0; r < 4; r++)
                for (int c2 = 0; c2 < 4; c2++)
                    for (int k = 0; k < 4; k++)
                        result[r * 4 + c2] += projMat[r * 4 + k] * viewMat[k * 4 + c2];
            c["cascadeViewProj"][ci].setData(result);

            // Set cascade data (texelSize etc.)

   640|            cd.splitDepth = 0.0f;
            cd.texelSize = 1.0f / (float)kShadowMapSize;
            c["cascades"][ci].setData(cd);
```

```
static void lightCullPassCallback(GpuGraphPassContext* ctx, void* userData) {
    FrameData* d = (FrameData*)userData;
    if (!ctx->computePass || !d->pipelines->lightCullPipeline) return;
    auto* cpEnc = reinterpret_cast<IComputePassEncoder*>(ctx->computePass);
    cpEnc->bindPipeline(d->pipelines->lightCullPipeline);
    uint32_t tilesX = (d->surfaceWidth + 15) / 16;
    uint32_t tilesY = (d->surfaceHeight + 15) / 16;
    cpEnc->dispatchCompute(tilesX, tilesY, 1);
   760|}
```

#pragma once

#include "gpu/gpu.h"
#include "gpu/bindless/gpu_bindless_heap.h"
#include "gpu/core/gpu_internal.h"

#ifdef _MSC_VER
#pragma warning(push)
#pragma warning(disable : 4267)
    10|#endif
#include <slang-rhi.h>
#ifdef _MSC_VER
#pragma warning(pop)
#endif

inline bool descriptorFromBindlessHeap(GpuBindlessHeap heap, uint32_t index, rhi::DescriptorHandle& out)
{
    GpuDescriptorHandleInfo info = {};
    if (gpuBindlessGetDescriptorHandle(heap, index, &info) != GPU_SUCCESS) return false;
    20|    out.type = static_cast<rhi::DescriptorHandleType>(info.type);
    out.value = info.value;
    return out.value != 0;
}

inline bool descriptorFromTextureView(
    GpuDevice device,
    GpuTextureHandle viewHandle,
    rhi::DescriptorHandleAccess access,
    rhi::DescriptorHandle& out)
    30|{
    if (!device || !viewHandle.index) return false;
    auto* view = device->textureViewPool.resolve(viewHandle.index, viewHandle.generation);
    if (!view) return false;
    return SLANG_SUCCEEDED(view->getDescriptorHandle(access, &out));
}

inline bool shaderCursorSetDescriptor(rhi::ShaderCursor& cursor, const rhi::DescriptorHandle& handle)
{
    if (!handle) return false;
    40|    return SLANG_SUCCEEDED(cursor.setDescriptorHandle(handle));
}

inline bool shaderCursorSetDescriptor(rhi::ShaderCursor& cursor, const char* field, const rhi::DescriptorHandle& handle)
{
    if (!handle) return false;
    return SLANG_SUCCEEDED(cursor[field].setDescriptorHandle(handle));
}

inline bool shaderCursorSetBindlessHeap(
    50|    rhi::ShaderCursor& cursor,
    const char* field,
    GpuBindlessHeap heap,
    uint32_t index)
{
    rhi::DescriptorHandle handle = {};
    if (!descriptorFromBindlessHeap(heap, index, handle)) return false;
    return shaderCursorSetDescriptor(cursor, field, handle);
}
